title: lastrea conterminoides
intro: Lastrea conterminoides, also known as the Asian wavy spleenwort, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lastrea conterminoides can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
